non_blocking_issues: NEW: activeNotifications guard over-suppresses a genuine busy->idle re-cycle (nothing cancels a lingering shade entry when root leaves idle set; only onEnterForeground cancels). Pre-fix idleSince-in-key produced a fresh id so user was re-alerted.
Decision dedup now grow-only across restarts.
Guard matches id only; seed load on main thread; persist full-snapshot race; test gaps.
notes: busy->idle missed-alert (desktop/TUI driven = main use case) is a should-fix regression; bridge-persist gap secondary.
